name: Sandlot Engineering, LLC
subject: Take on more clients with faster turnaround
body:
Howdy Sandlot Engineering, LLC,

Aeroview Drone Technologies, is a Houston-based provider specialized in supplying high-quality aerial data for professional land surveyors.

We deliver clean, cm accurate, drone-captured datasets that integrate smoothly into established surveying workflows.

Our commitment is simple:
- Precise Deliverables: 2D orthomosaics, 3D site reconstructions, point clouds, and additional data as needed.
- Speed You Can Rely On: Turnaround times are often 5X-10X faster than traditional methods.
- Deliverables Tailored to you: Our deliverables are prepped and delivered for your needs.

We are fully FAA-licensed, insured, and operate with a strict safety-first protocol tailored for active jobsites.

Many of my most trusted partnerships started with a simple introduction. We would welcome the opportunity to meet you — whether over coffee, at your office, or on a quick phone call — to learn about your firm and explore how Aeroview can become a reliable extension of your team.

If you are interested you can reach out either by replying here or on our website Avdronetech.com!

name: Pape-Dawson Engineers
subject: Move straight into drafting within 48 hours
body:
Howdy Pape-Dawson Engineers,

Quick question on your current turnaround from field collection to usable deliverables. We've seen a gap on a lot of projects where data is collected on time, but surfaces and orthos take longer to finalize, which slows down decision making. On a recent 50-acre site in Houston, we combined aerial capture with ground control points to deliver a fully aligned dataset within 48 hours. Allowing the survey team to move straight into drafting and line work.

The main impact is faster decisions while keeping accuracy.

Would it be worth seeing how that fits into your current turnaround times?

name: MIF Contracting LLC
subject: Keep stakeholders informed with aerial site data
body:
Howdy MIF Contracting LLC,

Aeroview Drone Technologies specializes in providing General Contractors and Project Managers with high-precision aerial data that bridges the gap between the field and the office.

We've seen how traditional site walk-throughs and manual reporting can slow down a project. We help teams move faster by delivering accurate, actionable 2D and 3D site models that can be shared with anyone no matter the location.

How we support your site teams:
- Progress Tracking: High-resolution 2D orthomosaics and 3D site reconstructions to verify work and keep stakeholders informed.
- Precision Volumetrics: Instant cut and fill data and stockpile measurements to help gather general earthwork estimates without waiting days for a ground crew.
- Safety and Compliance: Detailed site documentation that reduces risk, minimizes rework, and keeps personnel out of harm's way.
- Speed: Deliverables provided faster than traditional methods, keeping your schedule on track.

We are fully FAA-licensed, insured, and operate with a strict safety-first protocol tailored for active jobsites.

Many of my most trusted partnerships started with a simple introduction. We would welcome the opportunity to meet you — whether over coffee, at your office, or on a quick phone call — to learn about your firm and explore how Aeroview can become a reliable extension of your team.

If you are interested you can reach out either by replying here or on our website Avdronetech.com!
